binary_carrier: six-bit line field, string appears top-to-bottom; line 1 is bottom so line flip uses index 6-line
bridge_locks: Wilhelm dataset exposes a 64-node hypercube under single-line changes.
od field is exactly bitwise complement of the six-line carrier.
King Wen odd/even pairing is governed by reverse unless reverse is same/self, then complement for palindromic hexagrams.
This supplies an operational transition/readout graph, not just a static 64-symbol table.
